description: Release-ready Lane A fixture for testing MLIPs against a strong Ni classical reference. Single-point energy/force/stress/relaxation labels are generated from NIST Mishin-1999 EAM; elastic constants are anchored to the existing Ni literature/NIST Cij table.

metadata.hard_lane_status: pending MS25 or Li solid-ion-conductor label ingest
metadata.reference_model_scope: EAM-home-turf classical reference for single-point rows; not a DFT hard-lane fixture.
metadata.surface_defect_compression_status: pending exact reference-value ingest from open Ni benchmark sources
